title: Option to suppress install dialog on Windows side
body:
### Feature request description

For the windows install of Podman, it would be nice to have an option or way to suppress the install wizard dialog. 
And option along side the installer exe to say yes or no to the wsl install. 

### Suggest potential solution

A flag for the install executable to answer the install wsl question at install time.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

We have extracted the msi from the executable but this removes the option to install WSL from the install process.

### Additional context

At our company, we create install packages that will install podman in the background for our users. 
However this install dialog pops up and causes the background install to timeout as it requires user input.

comments.body: I don't have a windows box to test but reading https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/build_windows.md#test-the-windows-installer this seems to be already possible
the wizard supports WSL now and HyperV will be added in future by @l0rd ... I have certainly seen this option on the installer.

Good to know. 
Thank you for your prompt response.
